causalNote: CAUSAL sealed build; ichimoku_lagging excluded from output

5m.null_behavior: PASS — three categories of NaN, all causal and correct. (1) Warmup-head NaNs: 89 columns contiguous at series head (indicator warm-up, expected). (2) Zero-range degenerate NaNs: stochastic_k, stochastic_d, williams_r_14, mfi_14, vwap and their _rel_* variants carry mid-series NaNs at two clusters (2021-02-11 UTC, 2023-03-24 UTC) where consecutive flat candles produce denominator=0; correctly preserved, not leakage. (3) Sparse event columns: gann_swing_change (556K NaNs), gann_swing_top and gann_swing_bottom (~593K each) are structurally sparse — fire only at swing reversals/confirmed tops-bottoms, not warmup-gated. (4) No-level-available state: open_rel_1h_levels (276 mid-series NaNs) and open_rel_1D_levels (9) are NaN when no confirmed S/R fractal level exists at that row; breakout columns correctly use 0.0 sentinel. Policy: preserve NaN (no backfill). Not leakage. [Corrected per Sentinel audit F-1, 2026-06-22]
5m.htf_leakage: PASS (no leakage issues detected; htf_confirmed_* NaN at first row)

1h.null_behavior: PASS — three categories of NaN, all causal and correct. (1) Warmup-head NaNs: 89 columns contiguous at series head (indicator warm-up, expected). (2) Zero-range degenerate NaNs: stochastic_k, stochastic_d, williams_r_14, mfi_14, vwap and their _rel_* variants may carry mid-series NaNs at flat-candle clusters where denominator=0; correctly preserved, not leakage. (3) Sparse event columns: gann_swing_change, gann_swing_top, gann_swing_bottom are structurally sparse — fire only at swing reversals/confirmed tops-bottoms, not warmup-gated. (4) No-level-available state: open_rel_1h_levels and open_rel_1D_levels are NaN when no confirmed S/R fractal level exists at that row; breakout columns correctly use 0.0 sentinel. Policy: preserve NaN (no backfill). Not leakage. [Corrected per Sentinel audit F-1, 2026-06-22]
1h.htf_leakage: PASS (no leakage issues detected; htf_confirmed_* NaN at first row)

windowing.note: All 149 certified columns are exported. Only rows are windowed: the most-recent N rows per timeframe (browser-safe; past warmup nulls). No values recomputed; cells copied verbatim from the certified CSV (NaN→null). Window is reproducible via windowRowRange.
